    "The submittal omits the product listing page and project note required to verify the conductor shortcut.",
    "Conductor selection and sizing cannot be verified as compliant without the missing submittal documentation."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Halt the conductor installation shortcut immediately.",
    "Request the missing product listing page and project note from the design engineer or manufacturer.",
    "Verify the proposed conductor sizing against NEC Table 310.16 once the submittal documentation is complete."
  ],
  "rationale": "A shortcut in conductor selection and sizing cannot be approved during an in-progress commercial installation without the complete submittal package, including product listings and project notes, to ensure compliance with NEC 310 and Table 310.16.",

    "NEC 310",
    "NEC Table 310.16"
  ]
